HGSS.038.0000:
Hello, and welcome to
the Pokémon Center.\f
We restore your tired Pokémon
to full health.\f
Would you like to rest your
Pokémon?[0200,0000]
HGSS.038.0001:
OK, I’ll take your Pokémon for a few
seconds.
HGSS.038.0002:
Thank you for waiting.\f
We’ve restored your Pokémon to full
health.\f
HGSS.038.0003: Please, come back again any time!
HGSS.038.0004:
Hello, and welcome to
the Pokémon Center.\f
We restore your tired Pokémon
to full health.\f
Would you like to...\f
HGSS.038.0005:
Th-that Trainer Card!\f
That wonderful shade!
And all those stars!\f
I’ve seen several Trainers with
Violet Trainer Cards up to now...\f
But you’re the first to top them
with that impressive Trainer Card.\f
Please, [0103,0000,0000], may I please
heal your Pokémon? [0200,0000]
HGSS.038.0006:
Great to see you, [0103,0000,0000]!
You want the usual, right? [0200,0000]
HGSS.038.0007:
I will be pleased to take your
Pokémon for a few seconds.
HGSS.038.0009: We hope to see you again!
HGSS.038.0010:
Your Pokémon may be infected with
the Pokérus.\f
Little is known about the Pokérus
except that they are microscopic\r
life-forms that attach to Pokémon.\f
While infected, Pokémon are said to
grow exceptionally well.
HGSS.038.0011:
[0103,0000,0000] is out of battle-ready
Pokémon!\f
[0103,0000,0000]’s vision dimmed!
HGSS.038.0013: Would you like to save the game? [0200,0000]
HGSS.038.0014:
There is already a saved file.
Is it OK to overwrite it? [0200,0000]
HGSS.038.0015:
Saving...
Don’t turn off the power.
HGSS.038.0020:
There is already a saved game file.
It is impossible to save.\f
Please refer to the Instruction
Booklet for details.\f
Press Up + SELECT + B Button on
the title screen if you want to erase\r
the current saved game file.
HGSS.038.0021:
Saving a lot of data...
Don’t turn off the power.
HGSS.038.0027:
Too bad!
The Bag is full...
HGSS.038.0031:
[0103,0000,0000] put away the
[011F,0001,0000] in the Fashion Case.
HGSS.038.0034:
The Pokémon Storage System
was accessed.\f
HGSS.038.0036:
Oak’s words echoed...
[0103,0000,0000]! There’s a time and\r
place for everything! But not now.
HGSS.038.0039:
There! All happy and healthy!
Good luck and take care!
HGSS.038.0040:
Mom: [0103,0000,0000]!
Welcome home.\f
It sounds like you had quite the
experience out there.\f
Maybe you should take a quick
rest so you can relax.\f
...
...
HGSS.038.0041:
Mom: Oh, good! You and your
Pokémon are looking great.\f
Oh, yes, I heard from Professor Elm.\f
He said that a Pokémon’s energy is
measured in HP (Hit Points).\f
If your Pokémon lose their HP,
you can restore it at any\r
Pokémon Center.\f
If you’re going to travel far away,
the smart Trainer stocks up on\r
Potions at the Pokémon Mart.\f
Make me proud, honey!
Take care!
HGSS.038.0042:
Mom: Oh, good! You and your
Pokémon are looking great.\f
Oh yes, [0103,0000,0000], your Pokémon
will faint if it runs out of HP.\f
If your Pokémon loses its HP, come
home before it faints.\f
It will be healed to full health by
taking a rest.\f
Well, honey, make me proud!
Take care!
HGSS.038.0043:
First, let’s restore your Pokémon
to full health.
HGSS.038.0044:
Your Pokémon have been healed
to perfect health.
HGSS.038.0045:
Please visit a Pokémon Center when
your Pokémon’s HP goes down.\f
If you’re planning to travel any
distance, you should stock up on\r
Potions at a Pokémon Mart.\f
Good luck, Trainer!
HGSS.038.0046: There’s no Mail in the Mailbox.\f
HGSS.038.0052:
[0101,0000,0000] survived the poisoning.
The poison faded away!\f
HGSS.038.0056: There appears to be nothing here...
HGSS.038.0057:
The sweet scent faded for some
reason...
HGSS.038.0060: You can’t dismount your Bike here!
HGSS.038.0063:
Would you like to give a nickname to the
newly hatched [0100,0000,0000]?
HGSS.038.0067:
I’m very sorry.\f
We are working underground right now.
It’s off-limits to the public.\f
Please try later on.
HGSS.038.0070:
There is text engraved in the back
of the obtained Plate...\f
“When the universe was created,
its shards became this Plate.”\f
HGSS.038.0071:
There is text engraved in the back
of the obtained Plate...\f
“The power of defeated giants
infuses this Plate.”\f
HGSS.038.0072:
There is text engraved in the back
of the obtained Plate...\f
“Two beings of time and space set
free from the Original One.”\f
HGSS.038.0073:
There is text engraved in the back
of the obtained Plate...\f
“Three beings were born to bind
time and space.”\f
HGSS.038.0074:
There is text engraved in the back
of the obtained Plate...\f
“Two make matter, and three make
spirit, shaping the world.”\f
HGSS.038.0075:
There is text engraved in the back
of the obtained Plate...\f
“The Original One breathed alone
before the universe came.”\f
HGSS.038.0076:
There is text engraved in the back
of the obtained Plate...\f
“The powers of Plates are shared
among Pokémon.”\f
HGSS.038.0077:
There is text engraved in the back
of the obtained Plate...\f
“The rightful bearer of a Plate
draws from the Plate it holds.”\f
HGSS.038.0078:
Ball Capsules can’t be used because
you don’t have any Seals.\f
HGSS.038.0080: Would you like to save the game?
HGSS.038.0081:
There is already a saved file.
Is it OK to overwrite it?
HGSS.038.0082:
Good morning!
Welcome to the Pokémon Center.\f
We restore your tired Pokémon
to full health.\f
Would you like to rest your
Pokémon? [0200,0000]
HGSS.038.0083:
Hello, and welcome to
the Pokémon Center.\f
We restore your tired Pokémon
to full health.\f
Would you like to rest your
Pokémon? [0200,0000]
HGSS.038.0084:
[0103,0000,0000]’s Azure Flute is making
a sound!\f
Would you like to blow into the
Azure Flute? [0200,0000]
HGSS.038.0087:
The Azure Flute echoed hollowly...\f
It appears to be meaningless using
the Azure Flute here...
HGSS.038.0089:
[0103,0000,0000] put away the
[011F,0001,0000] in the Fashion Case.\f
HGSS.038.0092:
Your Bag is full.\f
The Griseous Orb could not be removed,
so you cannot enter.
HGSS.038.0093:
Your Hall of Fame data is corrupted.\f
It will be fixed if you enter the
Hall of Fame again.\f
HGSS.038.0094:
[0103,0000,0000] received
[011F,0001,0000]!\f
But the Fashion Case is already full!
HGSS.038.0097:
[0103,0000,0000] found a Shiny Leaf!\f
But [0101,0001,0000] already has a
Shiny Leaf!
HGSS.038.0100:
Registered the phone number in the
Pokégear!\f
HGSS.038.0101:
[0100,0000,0000] is feeling better, so you
decided to take [0100,0000,0000] with you!\f
HGSS.038.0102:
Hey!\f
Can you tell me how you feel right
before a match? How you feel when you\r
win or lose? What it would be\r
like to be number one? [0200,0000]
HGSS.038.0103:
All right, tell me how you feel
before battle!\f
HGSS.038.0104:
All right, tell me how you feel after
you win!\f
HGSS.038.0105:
All right, tell me how you feel after
you lose!\f
HGSS.038.0106:
All right, tell me how it would feel to be
number one!\f
HGSS.038.0107:
Excuse me? You won’t say?
That’s too bad...
HGSS.038.0108:
Thank you! Will you tell me about
anything else? [0200,0000]
